data.description: LIBYA'S NATIONAL OIL CORPORATION SAYS PRODUCTION FULLY RESUMED AT SHARARA AND EL FEEL OILFIELDS

data.title: US merchants able to accept Bitcoin payments at POS, set to roll out over the next month; payments will be settled in USD.
data.description: In the upcoming month, a Block executive announced that Bitcoin payments at the point of sale will be activated automatically. Transactions will be settled in US dollars by default, with the implementation gradually taking place.

data.title: ARMAI Technologies Announces Strategic Relationship with First Federal Bank of Kansas City to Modernize Third-Party Risk and Embedded Finance Oversight
data.description: ARMAI Technologies, an AI fintech company in Charlotte, has partnered with First Federal Bank of Kansas City (FFBKC) to revamp third-party risk management, embedded finance oversight, and enterprise risk management processes. This collaboration comes as regional and community banks increasingly engage in embedded finance and sponsorship banking models. ARMAI specializes in intelligent risk automation and aims to enhance the risk management tools for FFBKC.

data.title: Finster AI Announces Strategic Partnership with FactSet to Power FactSet's new AI-native platform for Banking
data.description: Finster AI, a prominent provider of agentic AI solutions for the financial sector, has recently secured an investment from FactSet. In a strategic move, FactSet (NYSE: FDS | NASDAQ: FDS) has partnered with Finster AI to enhance its newly introduced AI-driven workflow. This partnership is expected to leverage FactSet's expertise and Finster AI's innovative solutions in the financial services sector.
Is Bitcoin Bottoming Out?

data.title: Toll Brothers Announces Final Opportunity to Build a New Luxury Home at Weston Reserve in Apex, North Carolina
data.description: A sought-after community in Apex is now offering elegant luxury homes for quick move-in. These homes feature modern design and are in high demand.

data.title: New Collibra Survey by The Harris Poll Finds 84% of Decision Makers Say Organizations Must Increase AI Spending in 2026 to Remain Competitive with Big Tech, with Almost Half Saying AI is Falling Short
data.description: A recent survey revealed that over 90% of individuals believe that companies should be mandated to disclose their utilization of artificial intelligence agents. Additionally, 64% of respondents expressed concerns when job candidates are unable to showcase proficiency with AI tools, considering it a potential "red flag." The survey findings were released in New York and Brussels on March 30, 2026, by Collibra, a prominent platform specializing in unified governance for data and AI technologies.

data.title: Village Farms Favorably Amends and Extends Farm Credit Canada Loan
data.description: A company has enhanced its interest rate by 50 basis points and prolonged the maturity period by four years until February 2031.

data.title: Saia to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on April 30, 2026
data.description: Saia, Inc., a company listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol SAIA, revealed plans to unveil its latest quarterly financial report on Thursday, April 30th, before the market opens. The management of Saia will convene a conference call at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time that day to elaborate on the results.

data.title: Vireo Growth Inc. Announces Effectiveness of Management Services Agreement with  PharmaCann Inc.
data.description: On March 22, 2026, the Management Services Agreement came into effect, enabling Vireo to oversee specific assets of PharmaCann Colorado until the anticipated closing in the second quarter of 2026.

data.title: Teladoc Health Appoints Susan Salka, Experienced Healthcare Executive, to Its Board of Directors
data.description: On March 30, 2026, Teladoc Health, a prominent virtual care provider traded on the NYSE under the symbol TDOC, revealed the addition of Susan Salka to its board of directors. Salka, who previously held the roles of president and CEO at AMN Healthcare Services, a company offering healthcare workforce technology and staffing solutions nationwide, assumes the position immediately. This move comes after the departures of Eric Evans and Thomas McKinley, with Michael Smith also being appointed. Salka will play a role in the board's audit and compensation committees.

data.title: Xos Brings Its Mobile Energy Solutions to Facilities Professionals at the Southern California Facilities Expo
data.description: Xos is participating in the SoCal Facilities Expo in Anaheim on April 8th and 9th. The company will be highlighting their mobile EV charging solution that operates independently from the grid. This technology can be installed in a matter of days without requiring any upgrades to existing utilities infrastructure.

data.title: Backblaze Announces Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: In San Francisco, Backblaze, Inc. revealed that on March 24, 2026, they provided an equity inducement award to Rhett Dillingham, the Senior VP of Product, and Joey Myers, the VP of Revenue Operations. This award was granted to incentivize their employment with the company. Specifically, Mr. Dillingham received 194,240 restricted stock units (RSUs) while Mr. Myers received 82,650 RSUs.

data.title: Forgent Power Solutions Announces Closing of Public Offering of Class A Common Stock and Full Exercise of Underwriters’ Option to Purchase Additional Shares
data.description: Forgent Power Solutions, Inc. revealed the completion of a public offering of its Class A common stock. This offering involved the sale of 23,716,795 shares of Class A common stock by parent entities of the company controlled by Neos Partners, LP. Forgent is recognized for designing and producing electrical distribution equipment utilized in data centers, the power grid, and energy-intensive industrial facilities. The company, listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol FPS, continues to establish itself as a leading provider in this sector.

data.title: Inventiva reports 2025 full year results and provides a business update
data.description: Inventiva, a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company based in Daix, France, and New York City, USA, disclosed its financial performance for the year ending December 31, 2025. Trading on Euronext Paris and NASDAQ under the symbol IVA, Inventiva specializes in oral treatments for metabolic dysfunction-associated steatohepatitis (MASH). The company shared its annual financial report along with a business update.

data.title: Beta Bionics to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 21, 2026
data.description: Beta Bionics, Inc., a leading company in advanced diabetes management solutions, has disclosed its intention to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on April 21, 2026. The announcement is scheduled to occur after the financial markets shut for the day. A conference call and webcast are set to take place on the same day at 4:30 pm Eastern Time (1:30 pm Pacific Time) for management to analyze the performance of the company during the first quarter of 2026. Beta Bionics, Inc. is listed on the Nasdaq under the ticker symbol BBNX.

data.title: Image Sensing Systems, Inc. Expands Agreement with Econolite Control Products, Inc, Strengthens Partnership
data.description: Image Sensing Systems, Inc. ("ISNS"), a subsidiary of Autoscope Technologies Corporation (OTCQX: AATC), revealed today the completion of an Eighth Modification to its agreement with Econolite Control Products, Inc. This amendment impacts the company's Manufacturing, Distribution, and Technology License Agreement.

data.title: Arbor Realty Trust Declares Preferred Stock Dividends
data.description: Arbor Realty Trust, Inc. based in Uniondale, N.Y., disclosed that its Board of Directors approved cash dividends for its Series D, Series E, and Series F cumulative redeemable preferred stock. The dividends amount to $0.3984375, $0.390625, and $0.390625 per share, respectively. These dividends cover the period from January 30, 2026, to April 29, 2026. Shareholders of record as of April 15, 2026, will receive the dividends on April 30, 2026. The company's Series D, E, and F preferred stock are listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol "ABR."
